name: Reverse Escape Room: Archaeologists Sanctum
short_description: Short and sweet first person puzzler about archaeology, rivals, and robots.
detailed_description:
Biff Snodgrass is a smarmy tomb raidin’ archaeologist and your bitter rival. He hoards the ancient treasures from his adventures in a secret man cave behind a reverse escape room - a series of fiendish puzzles designed to keep you out, not in. Those ancient treasures should be in a museum!

Break into Biff’s hideout and steal the ancient treasures he's hiding to get them back where they belong!

Use your wits in this bite-sized puzzle adventure to figure out the gadgets and codes that guard Biff’s treasures and bypass them.

⁃ Innovative and irreverent puzzle design from a life time lover of the genre

⁃ Lateral thinking, pen-testing fun

⁃ Fully voiced larger than life characters
